Fee: USD 70. Invitation from registered Myanmar company or Chamber of Commerce required. Processing minimum 3 working days.

visa_policy.notes: Visa-free for ordinary passport holders applies to 9 ASEAN members (Brunei 14d, Cambodia 14d, Indonesia 14d, Laos 14d, Malaysia 14d pilot, Philippines 14d, Singapore 30d, Thailand 14d, Vietnam 14d). Vietnam corrected from 30 days to 14 days for ordinary passport per Embassy of Myanmar Riyadh bilateral table. Most other bilateral agreements cover diplomatic and official/service passport holders only. VOA pilot programs are in their second year: China/India from 30 Aug 2025 (through Aug 2026); Japan/Korea/Macau from 21 Oct 2025 (through Oct 2026); Hong Kong from 11 Mar 2025 (through 10 Mar 2026). Myanmar's political situation (military government since February 2021 coup) may affect practical application of these policies.

cbi.notes: No official citizenship-by-investment program found on any Myanmar government website. Myanmar's citizenship law (1982 Citizenship Law) does not provide for investment-based citizenship. No official announcement of such a program was found.

gaps: The evisa.moip.gov.mm portal pages rendered blank (likely JavaScript-heavy SPA) — e-visa country list was sourced from official Myanmar Consulate Hong Kong (myanmarconsulatehk.org) which mirrors the official evisa.moip.gov.mm notice.

The exact current e-visa tourist and business eligible countries may have changed since the consulate page data was last updated (latest note references September 2022) — the official portal evisa.moip.gov.mm could not be read directly.

No official page was found for RBI (residency by investment) or fast-track/skilled worker/digital nomad visa scheme — absence is consistent with Myanmar's current political and regulatory environment.

Japan/Korea/Macau VOA: The original pilot launched 21 October 2024 and was renewed from 21 October 2025 — the current active end date (21 October 2026) has not been confirmed via a separate official announcement page.
Hong Kong VOA extension (11 March 2025 to 10 March 2026) sourced from myanmarconsulatehk.org; no separate tourism.gov.mm announcement page was found for this extension.

Serbia conditional_access entry retained from the prior record (mofa.gov.mm October 2025 PDF) but not confirmed in the Embassy of Myanmar Riyadh bilateral table; may still be accurate but could not be cross-verified this session.

No official Myanmar government source was found establishing conditional entry rules based on holding a third-country visa, residence permit, or permanent residence — Myanmar's entry system is based solely on nationality and passport type.
Taiwan is listed as eligible for Business/Workshop/Transit VOA on the MFA on-arrival page; its status as a separate non-state entity means it has no bilateral treaty but is treated administratively.
Colombia and Sri Lanka bilateral exemption dates not available; only stay durations sourced from Embassy of Myanmar Riyadh bilateral table.
validation_notes: CORRECTED: Vietnam ordinary passport max_stay_days changed from 30 to 14 days. The 30-day duration applies to Diplomatic/Official passport holders only; the Riyadh embassy bilateral table clearly shows 14 days in the Ordinary Passport column for Vietnam.

CORRECTED: India VOA notes updated — same as China (second pilot 30 Aug 2025 through 29 Aug 2026).
CORRECTED: Japan VOA notes updated — original pilot started 21 October 2024; current active period is second pilot from 21 October 2025 (per tourism.gov.mm).
CORRECTED: South Korea VOA notes updated — same as Japan (second pilot from 21 October 2025).
CORRECTED: Macau SAR VOA notes updated — same as Japan (second pilot from 21 October 2025).
CORRECTED: Hong Kong SAR VOA notes updated — extended from 11 March 2025 through 10 March 2026 (per myanmarconsulatehk.org).
ADDED: Colombia to conditional_access — Diplomatic/Official only, 30 days. Was absent from previous record; confirmed via Embassy of Myanmar Riyadh bilateral table.

visa_free.name: Vietnam
visa_free.notes: ASEAN member. Ordinary passport: 30 days (per official MFA PDF dated 9 Oct 2025).

outbound_official.notes: Source is the official Myanmar Ministry of Foreign Affairs PDF 'List of Countries Having Bilateral Visa Exemption Agreements with Myanmar (As of 9 October 2025)', linked from mofa.gov.mm/consular-information/visa-free-travel/. This PDF lists 22 bilateral agreements total; only 9 ASEAN states extend visa-free access to Myanmar ORDINARY passport holders. All other bilateral agreements (Bangladesh, Belarus, Brazil, China, India, Japan, Korea ROK, Korea DPRK, Mongolia, Morocco, Nepal, Russia, Serbia) cover Diplomatic and/or Official/Service passport holders only — ordinary passport holders are not covered. Vietnam ordinary passport stay shown as 30 days in this official PDF (previous data_quality notes recorded 14 days based on Embassy of Myanmar Riyadh table; the authoritative MFA PDF now supersedes that).
